results.title: Jockey
results.content:
Twelve years after Davis retired, the "modern era of female jockeys" began when Olympic equestrian and show jumping competitor Kathy Kusner, who had also ridden as a jockey, successfully sued the Maryland Racing Commission for a jockey's license in 1967 under the Civil Rights Act.( She won her case in 1968 and became one of the earliest women to be licensed in the United States, though an injury prevented her from racing at the time.( In late 1968, Penny Ann Early was the first woman to earn a mount as a licensed Thoroughbred jockey in the U.S., when she entered three races at Churchill Downs in November, but the male jockeys announced a boycott of those races, and so she could not ride. On 7 February 1969, Diane Crump was the first licensed woman rider to ride in a parimutuel [...] 59.   ↑"Wantha Lorena Davis's Obituary". _Legacy.com_. Austin American-Statesman. 21 September 2012. results.title: Jockey: A Conversational Video Agent Using TwelveLabs
results.content:
To run Jockey, you need to sign up for a Twelve Labs account and get your API key from . With Twelve Labs' comprehensive suite of video understanding tools and Jockey's intelligent orchestration, you'll be well-equipped to build the next generation of video-powered applications that can search, analyze, and manipulate video content with unprecedented ease and accuracy.

Finally, join Twelve Labs' Multimodal Minds Discord server if you have questions or encounter issues when working with Jockey!

With Twelve Labs' comprehensive suite of video understanding tools and Jockey's intelligent orchestration, you'll be well-equipped to build the next generation of video-powered applications that can search, analyze, and manipulate video content with unprecedented ease and accuracy.

Finally, join Twelve Labs' Multimodal Minds Discord server if you have questions or encounter issues when working with Jockey!

## TL;DR [...] Jockey is an open-source conversational video agent built on LangGraph and Twelve Labs APIs that lets developers search, edit, and generate text from video content through a natural language interface, with a modular architecture that can be customized and extended for specific use cases.

results.title: My Disappointing Experience with Eleven Labs' AI | Theo Tabah posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content:
I wrestled with 11 AI and lost. Lost bad. This product, while in beta, is not ready for primetime. I love Eleven Labs and think they're doing some revolutionary stuff, but a mixed bag of bugs, design opportunities, and AX (Agentic Experience) misses made for quite a hilarious, and frustrating few minutes with Elle. Some quick hits: 1. When muted, be absolute certain the AI is not listening. Immediate trust-breaker. Unfortunately Elle was listening to everything, even on mute. 2. Make pacing and cadence easy to change. Even within the same voice. This one was terribly slow and monotonous. 3. Latency is a killer. Silence breeds doubt. Fix this to help with a more fluid conversation like one would expect with another person. 4. Make swapping voices easy - some design speed bumps and [...] it's not playing as nicely with. 11 dot AI 11 labs right now, but this is. Ohh I could choose Lily, that's cool. I have never been hurt by any. Oh, is that Archer? Where's Archer at? Archers there, maybe I can't choose Archer for something like this. The thing always happened. The world is round. I have never been hurt. Ohh Theo, that sounds really frustrating. And I truly apologize that you're experiencing those technical difficulties with the platform. It's never fun when things don't work as they should. Especially when you're. She's listening while I'm muted. Wild. OK. And then just took. Minutes to respond. We're going to end this now. This is not building trust. I am not feeling good about this relationship and right away this is burnt things. So what I'm going to do is I'm going to [...] Like Reply  1 Reaction   2 Reactions

I was excited to try 11L, but to your point(s), lots of bugs and quirks. I specifically signed up to play with the voice clone feature for some text to voice stuff, and could not for the life of me get past the verification stage. Apparently my voice doesn't sound enough like my voice.

## Written by Lakshmi narayana .U

582 followers

·16 following [...] Agents are everywhere. In simple terms, an agent is a software entity that can perceive its environment and act upon it to achieve specific goals. In the realm of artificial intelligence, agents can range from simple reflex agents that act based on immediate perceptions to more complex learning agents that adapt and evolve over time. Imagine you’re playing a video game, and there’s a non-player character that seems to know exactly where to go and what to do to win — this character is acting as an agent.

results.title: Jockey by TwelveLabs: The Video Intelligence Agent
results.content:
Jockey uses multimodal AI, analyzing visual, motion, and contextual cues, to group people across your library, rather than relying on traditional facial recognition. We do not build biometric databases, compare your data against external records, or share identity information between accounts. [...] Find all the hikes with mountain views in my library.

Here are the hikes with mountain views from your library. Bookmark any that look good, or tell me more about what you’re looking for, like length, difficulty, or scenery, and I can refine the list.
